# sy-universe

## Person
- Name: 승연 (Seungyeon, qorbaxk)
- Role: Frontend Developer
- Email: qorbaxk97@gmail.com
- Location: Korea
- Focus: React, TypeScript, product UI, canvas editor UX, NestJS, LangGraph AI agents

## Experience
- Connectwave (커넥트웨이브): Frontend Developer, 2025-05-20 — present
  - Sellfit AI: AI ecommerce content builder (editor, export, AI generation, guide chatbot)
- Next Innovation (넥스트이노베이션): Frontend Developer, 2023-06-28 — 2025-03-19
  - Kangbuk Samsung Hospital health checkup web booking
  - Reason Market (now DutAon) admin

## Sellfit AI (featured hub + satellites)
- Hub sellfit: AI ecommerce detail-page builder. Stack spans React/Zustand/TanStack Query, NestJS, FastAPI/LangGraph, AWS Bedrock, Redis, ECS.
- Satellite sellfit-editor: Custom canvas editor with block/component stores, drag, multi-select, undo/redo.
- Satellite sellfit-export: html2canvas high-quality image export with compression, GIF/ZIP handling.
- Satellite sellfit-ai-gen: End-to-end AI description generation (FE UI + Nest Bedrock chaining + keyword agent).
- Satellite sellfit-guide-bot: RAG guide chatbot with citations, session history, streaming UI.
- Bonus on hub: skin-maker LangGraph agent, image rembg/SSIM pipeline, admin billing/prompt tools.

## Other projects
- Kangbuk Samsung Hospital booking: domain-heavy web reservation flow
- Reason Market admin: commerce operations admin UI

## Skills
- Core: React, TypeScript, JavaScript, HTML/CSS, Zustand, TanStack Query, NestJS
- Product: Canvas Editor, Streaming Chat UX, Admin UX, Form/Workflow
- Tooling: Vite, Git, REST API, GitHub Actions, LangGraph, AWS Bedrock, Redis, FastAPI

## Live demos on this site
- Contact form → Nest POST /api/contact (SQLite)
- Portfolio Guide chat → Nest SSE BFF → Python FastAPI keyword RAG over this content
